label: Market Order Flow
description: Scrollable order flow table with timestamps, latency, side, venue, and aggressor flag.

l0.notes: All checks pass. isLoading/error/onRetry wired via TableWidget.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().orderFlowData via useLiveFeed() — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: orderFlowData is market-wide (instrument-level) data — not scoped by org. Correct for market feed.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file ✓.

l1.notes: 1.1/1.2/1.7 pass. 1.3–1.6 N/A — orderFlowData is market-wide instrument data.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applicable modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (static mock data, no tick) / paper ✓ (identical to live for feed display).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); isBatch disables liveBookUpdates (returns []) ✓.

3.3.note: Human: confirm no order submission possible in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: feed displays read-only order data. No submission in this widget.

3.6.note: useLiveFeed is a memoized slice (no setInterval). orderFlowData is static mock — no live ticking to disable.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human needed for 3.3/3.4.

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers — widget is read-only table ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify table columns visible and data legible.

4.4.note: Human: confirm table renders order flow rows correctly.

4.6.note: Entitlement checks at registry level, not per-render.

4.8.note: Human: verify horizontal scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all market order flow (crypto, tradfi, defi asset classes). Displays exchange time, local time, delay, type, side, price, size, venue, aggressor for any instrument.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 not in scope for this pass.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl — uses var(--pnl-positive)/var(--pnl-negative) CSS vars ✓.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget — useLiveFeed internally memoized ✓.

8.1.note: text-[10px] used throughout column cells (lines 19/29/39/49/84/95/111/114). HFT data density pattern — no Tailwind token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
. Read-only table ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify scroll behavior at minW=6, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Distinct market-wide order feed — not mergeable with my-orders (own orders) or live-book (book updates).

relationships.notes: Driven by markets-controls (assetClass, orderFlowRange). Reads market-wide order flow. No cross-widget selection emitted.

dataContract.notes: Mock: generateOrderFlowData() via MarketsDataContext. Production: WebSocket order flow feed per instrument/venue. useLiveFeed ring-buffer caps at 500 rows.

coverage.notes: Shows all market orders for selected asset class and range. DeFi orderFlowData reuses crypto order format (placeholder until real AMM feed wired).

knownIssues: orderFlowData not batch-guarded in context (context disables liveBookUpdates in batch but not orderFlowData) — acceptable since static mock has no tick interval.

findings.description: markets-order-flow-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings (Exch Time, Local, Delay, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-order-flow-widget.tsx:19,29,39,49,84,95,111,114 — text-[10px] used in table cells and badge labels
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern accepted across codebase. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced all text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro = 0.625rem) across cells, badges, and info labels.
